seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly 150-200 words.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 300 words.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must contain exactly 150-200 words. The email must contain at least 300 words.
response:
I cannot fulfill this request because it contains contradictory instructions. You have asked for an email that must contain exactly 150-200 words, but you also required it to contain at least 300 words. It is mathematically impossible for a text to be both under 200 words and over 300 words simultaneously.

If you would like me to write the email, please clarify which word count constraint you would like me to follow.<turn|>
